description: Create a two-column content slide on whether 2024 was a bad year for respondents' country, with explanatory survey text on the left and a ranked horizontal stacked bar chart of agree vs disagree by market plus change vs 2023 on the right.

header.headline: 2024 was a bad year for my country
header.sub: Please indicate if you agree very much, agree somewhat, disagree somewhat or disagree very much with the following statements:

left.body: Please indicate if you agree very much, agree somewhat, disagree somewhat or disagree very much with the following statements:

right.title: Market agree vs disagree and change agree vs 2023

footer.source: Base: 23,721 adults aged 18 years and older in India, 18-74 in Canada, Republic of Ireland, Malaysia, the Philippines, South Africa, Turkey, and the United States, 20-74 in Thailand, 21-74 in Indonesia and Singapore, and 16-74 in all other countries. Friday, October 25 – Friday November 8, 2024. © Ipsos Predictions 2025 Report
